name: openssh-server
description: Drift check for OpenSSH Server. The capability install, service config, firewall rule, and sshd_config password-auth assertion are owned by client\bootstrap-winrm.ps1 (interactive admin shell -- DISM rejects Add-WindowsCapability under WinRM). This provider only re-asserts those settings if they have drifted since bootstrap.
verify: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "${log}=Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\verify\openssh-server-verify.log'; ${svc}=Get-Service -Name 'sshd' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if (-not ${svc}) { 'sshd service not registered' | Out-File -FilePath ${log} -Encoding UTF8; exit 1 }; ${tries}=0; while (${svc}.Status -ne 'Running' -and ${tries} -lt 15) { Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; ${svc}.Refresh(); ${tries}++ }; if (${svc}.Status -eq 'Running') { Set-Content -Path ${log} -Value ('sshd Status=' + ${svc}.Status + ' StartType=' + ${svc}.StartType + ' waited=' + (${tries}*2) + 's'); Set-Content -Path (Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\smoke\openssh-server-smoke.txt') -Value 'openssh_server_ok' } else { ('sshd never reached Running after 30s (last status=' + ${svc}.Status + ')') | Out-File -FilePath ${log} -Encoding UTF8; exit 1 }"
